subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the Wronged One hath sent down unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting, that the sweet-scented breezes of revelation may draw him unto the horizon [3.5s]... ...The divines of Persia committed that which no people amongst the peoples of the world have committed
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم لتجذبه نفحات الوحی الی الافق
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
